block_01: In one of the previous articles we have already discussed how to keep your IQ Option account safe and whether the deposit, withdrawal and verification procedures are secure. This time, let’s talk about an external threat to your money — scammers.
block_02: While most traders are alert and careful, scammers work on their schemes and find new ways to trick people and steal their money. Read this article to know how to identify a scammer and not become their next victim.
